name: Next.js with Nginx Reverse Proxy
description: Deploy Next.js behind Nginx reverse proxy with SSL support

steps.name: Create Nginx configuration
Create docker-compose.yml
steps.command:
cat > ${DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/docker-compose.yml << 'EOF'
version: '3.8'
services:
  app:
    image: ${DOCKER_IMAGE}
    container_name: ${APP_NAME}-app
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=production
      - MONGODB_URI=${MONGODB_URI}
      - JWT_SECRET=${JWT_SECRET}
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - doez-network
    expose:
      - "3000"

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    container_name: ${APP_NAME}-nginx
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ${DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro
      - ${DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/certs:/etc/nginx/certs:ro
    depends_on:
      - app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - doez-network

networks:
  doez-network:
    driver: bridge
EOF

steps.name: Verify Nginx is running
steps.command: curl -k https://localhost/ || echo 'SSL certificate needs to be replaced'

postDeployment.notes: Replace self-signed certificate with valid Let's Encrypt certificate using Certbot
